title: Maps — draw a map of the world and mark a place on it
persona: P2 Linh (worldbuilder) who wants to SEE her world laid out
fixture: a world (with a book moved into it) owned by the caller; NO map yet. The agent must discover the world_map_* tools and create a map + place a marker.

turns.user: I want to see my world laid out — make a map for it.
Put my capital city, Ironhold, on the map.
